title: The Man from the Alamo
writer: Steve Fisher, D.D. Beauchamp, Niven Busch
actors: Glenn Ford, Julie Adams, Chill Wills
plot: During the Alamo siege, John Stroud is sent to Ox Bow to protect the townsfolk but, following a massacre, he infiltrates Jess Wade's gang of turncoat renegades supporting the Mexicans.
